# Blackwell camp split - datacenter (tcgen05) vs consumer (warp-block-scale)

*Machine-generated by `results/summarize_camp.py` from the shipped verdict matrices (`results_full_ptx93.json`, `results_ptx93.json`) + the rigorous SASS marker report (`sass_camp_report2.json`). Nothing hand-typed. Camps: datacenter = sm_100a / sm_103a / sm_110a; consumer = sm_120a / sm_120f / sm_121a. ptxas V13.3.73.*

**Summary.** The Blackwell family splits by *tensor-core lineage*, not form factor. 68 instructions are consumer-only and 7 datacenter-only at the compile level (+11 datacenter-subset); of those that compile on both camps, 20 lower to a different *mechanism* (consumer traps / software-emulates / degrades) and 13 to a different *native encoding*. Every other instruction lowers identically, and **sm120 == sm121** byte-for-byte.

## Tier 1 - compile-level exclusives (one camp arch-rejects the other's)

### Consumer-only (68) - reject on all datacenter targets, by family
- **1_blockscale_mma** (29): `mxf4.m16n8k64.sv2X.ue8m0.e2m1xe2m1`, `mxf4nvf4.m16n8k64.sv2X.ue8m0.e2m1xe2m1`, `mxf4nvf4.m16n8k64.sv4X.ue4m3.e2m1xe2m1`, `mxf4nvf4.m16n8k64.sv4X.ue8m0.e2m1xe2m1`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m1xe2m1`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m1xe2m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m1xe3m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m1xe4m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m1xe5m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m3xe2m1`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m3xe2m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m3xe3m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m3xe4m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e2m3xe5m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e3m2xe2m1`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e3m2xe2m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e3m2xe3m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e3m2xe4m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e3m2xe5m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e4m3xe2m1`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e4m3xe2m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e4m3xe3m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e4m3xe4m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e4m3xe5m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e5m2xe2m1`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e5m2xe2m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e5m2xe3m2`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e5m2xe4m3`, `mxf8f6f4.k32.sv1X.ue8m0.e5m2xe5m2`
- **23_video_simd** (1): `add.sat.s16x2`
- **2_plain_mma** (21): `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m1.e2m1.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m1.e2m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m1.e3m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m1.e4m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m1.e5m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m3.e2m1.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m3.e2m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m3.e3m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m3.e4m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e2m3.e5m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e3m2.e2m1.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e3m2.e2m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e3m2.e3m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e3m2.e4m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e3m2.e5m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e4m3.e2m1.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e4m3.e2m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e4m3.e3m2.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e5m2.e2m1.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e5m2.e2m3.f32`, `kindf8f6f4.k32.f32.e5m2.e3m2.f32`
- **2_sparse_mma** (2): `sp_om.kindf8f6f4.m16n8k64.f32.e2m1.e2m1.f32`, `sp_om.mxf8f6f4.bs.k64.sv1X.ue8m0`
- **G1_simd** (15): `add.s8x4`, `add.sat.s16x2`, `add.sat.s8x4`, `add.sat.u16x2`, `add.sat.u32`, `add.sat.u8x4`, `add.u8x4`, `max.s8x4`, `max.u8x4`, `min.s8x4`, `min.u8x4`, `neg.s8x4`, `sub.s8x4`, `sub.sat.s8x4`, `sub.u8x4`

### Datacenter-only (7) - reject on all consumer targets
  `cp.async.bulk.tensor.2d.g2s.cta_group2`, `tcgen05.cp`, `tcgen05.mma.f16`, `tcgen05.mma.mxf4nvf4.blockscale`, `tcgen05.alloc`, `tcgen05.commit`, `tcgen05.ld`

### Datacenter-subset (11) - reject on all consumer, accept on only SOME datacenter
- `rs.bf16x2.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `rs.f16x2.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `rs.satfinite.e2m1x4.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `rs.satfinite.e2m3x4.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `rs.satfinite.e3m2x4.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `rs.satfinite.e4m3x4.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `rs.satfinite.e5m2x4.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `redux.sync.max.NaN.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `redux.sync.max.abs.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `redux.sync.max.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
- `redux.sync.min.f32` (accepts on sm_100a, sm_103a)
